final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing editorial magazine cover for a Xiaohongshu (小红书) post announcing GPT-image-2 on the Lovart platform.

Style/medium: high-end editorial magazine cover
Composition: diagonal composition
Subject: announcement that GPT-image-2 is now available on Lovart
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: high contrast with strong accent color
Color palette: high contrast with strong accent color
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart"
Constraints: must include the text "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" prominently
Avoid:
